name: Chocolate Syrup Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Frost with a fudge icing.
